name: CNSIG Inner Mongolia Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: CNSIG Inner Mongolia Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. produces and sells salt, salt chemical, and bio-pharmacy products primarily in China. The company offers salt products, such as wash and vacuum iodic, remove-calcium wash, secondary, and original big salt; and chemical products, including sodium metal, sodium chlorate, sodium methoxide, soda ash, and trichloroisocyanuric acid. Its products also cover coal, limestone, and other resources. The company also exports its products to the European Union, the United States, Japan, Australia, Brazil, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Inner Mongolia Lantai Industrial Co., Ltd. CNSIG Inner Mongolia Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Alxa Zuoqi, China.
